# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: 0
  DOCKER_DRIVER: overlay2
  RELEASE_NOTES_FILE: "release_notes.md"

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

extract_mr_info:
  stage: prepare
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
        echo "Fetching MR information for MR !$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID"
        
        MR_INFO=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" \
          "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID")
        
        MR_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.title')
        MR_DESCRIPTION=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.description')
        MR_AUTHOR=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.author.name')
        MR_LABELS=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.labels | join(", ")')
        MR_SOURCE_BRANCH=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.source_branch')
        MR_TARGET_BRANCH=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.target_branch')
        
        echo "MR_TITLE=$MR_TITLE" >> build.env
        echo "MR_DESCRIPTION=$MR_DESCRIPTION" >> build.env
        echo "MR_AUTHOR=$MR_AUTHOR" >> build.env
        echo "MR_LABELS=$MR_LABELS" >> build.env
        echo "MR_SOURCE_BRANCH=$MR_SOURCE_BRANCH" >> build.env
        echo "MR_TARGET_BRANCH=$MR_TARGET_BRANCH" >> build.env
        echo "MR_URL=$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_PROJECT_URL/-/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" >> build.env
        
        SANITIZED_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//')
        echo "SANITIZED_MR_TITLE=$SANITIZED_TITLE" >> build.env
        
        echo "Feature being built: $MR_TITLE"
        echo "Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
      else
        echo "MR_TITLE=Direct Commit to $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH" >> build.env
        echo "MR_DESCRIPTION=No merge request associated" >> build.env
        echo "MR_AUTHOR=$GITLAB_USER_NAME" >> build.env
        echo "MR_LABELS=" >> build.env
        echo "MR_SOURCE_BRANCH=$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH" >> build.env
        echo "MR_TARGET_BRANCH=$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH" >> build.env
        echo "MR_URL=$CI_PROJECT_URL/-/commit/$CI_COMMIT_SHA" >> build.env
        echo "SANITIZED_MR_TITLE=direct-commit" >> build.env
      fi
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
    paths:
      - build.env
    expire_in: 1 hour

build:
  stage: build
  image: docker:latest
  services:
    - docker:dind
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
  script:
    - echo "Building feature: $MR_TITLE"
    - |
      BUILD_TAG="$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA-$SANITIZED_MR_TITLE"
      echo "Build tag: $BUILD_TAG"
      echo "BUILD_TAG=$BUILD_TAG" >> build.env
      
      docker build \
        --build-arg MR_TITLE="$MR_TITLE" \
        --build-arg MR_AUTHOR="$MR_AUTHOR" \
        --build-arg BUILD_DATE="$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')" \
        --build-arg COMMIT_SHA="$CI_COMMIT_SHA" \
        --label "mr.title=$MR_TITLE" \
        --label "mr.author=$MR_AUTHOR" \
        --label "mr.url=$MR_URL" \
        --label "git.commit=$CI_COMMIT_SHA" \
        --tag "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$BUILD_TAG" \
        --tag "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest" \
        .
      
      echo "Docker image built with labels containing MR information"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
    paths:
      - build.env
    expire_in: 1 hour

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
  script:
    - echo "Testing feature: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Running tests for MR from $MR_AUTHOR"
    - echo "Test results will be tagged with MR info"

generate_release_notes:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache git
    - |
      echo "# Release Notes - $(date +'%Y-%m-%d')" > $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "## Features and Changes" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
        echo "### $MR_TITLE" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "**Author:** $MR_AUTHOR" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "**Labels:** $MR_LABELS" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "**Merge Request:** [!$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID]($MR_URL)" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "**Description:**" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "$MR_DESCRIPTION" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "**Commits:**" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        git log --pretty=format:"- %s (%h)" -10 >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      else
        echo "### Direct Commit" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "**Author:** $MR_AUTHOR" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "**Branch:** $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
        echo "**Commit:** $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      fi
      
      echo "" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "---" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "**Build Information:**" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "- Pipeline: $CI_PIPELINE_URL" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "- Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHA" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "- Branch: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      
      cat $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
    expire_in: 30 days

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build
  environment:
    name: staging
    deployment_tier: staging
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging: $MR_TITLE"
    - |
      DEPLOYMENT_TAG="staging-$BUILD_TAG-$(date +'%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')"
      echo "Deployment tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
      echo "DEPLOYMENT_TAG=$DEPLOYMENT_TAG" >> deploy.env
      
      echo "Creating deployment with metadata:"
      echo "  Feature: $MR_TITLE"
      echo "  Author: $MR_AUTHOR"
      echo "  MR: !$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID"
      
      echo "Simulating deployment to staging environment"
      echo "kubectl set image deployment/app app=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$BUILD_TAG"
      echo "kubectl annotate deployment/app mr-title=\"$MR_TITLE\""
      echo "kubectl annotate deployment/app mr-author=\"$MR_AUTHOR\""
      echo "kubectl annotate deployment/app deployment-tag=\"$DEPLOYMENT_TAG\""
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: deploy.env
    expire_in: 1 hour
  only:
    - merge_requests
    - main
    - develop

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build
  environment:
    name: production
    deployment_tier: production
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production: $MR_TITLE"
    - |
      PROD_DEPLOYMENT_TAG="prod-$BUILD_TAG-$(date +'%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')"
      echo "Production deployment tag: $PROD_DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
      
      echo "Creating production deployment record:"
      echo "{" > deployment_record.json
      echo "  \"deployment_tag\": \"$PROD_DEPLOYMENT_TAG\"," >> deployment_record.json
      echo "  \"mr_title\": \"$MR_TITLE\"," >> deployment_record.json
      echo "  \"mr_author\": \"$MR_AUTHOR\"," >> deployment_record.json
      echo "  \"mr_labels\": \"$MR_LABELS\"," >> deployment_record.json
      echo "  \"commit_sha\": \"$CI_COMMIT_SHA\"," >> deployment_record.json
      echo "  \"pipeline_url\": \"$CI_PIPELINE_URL\"," >> deployment_record.json
      echo "  \"deployed_at\": \"$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')\"" >> deployment_record.json
      echo "}" >> deployment_record.json
      
      cat deployment_record.json
      
      echo "kubectl set image deployment/app app=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$BUILD_TAG"
      echo "kubectl annotate deployment/app mr-title=\"$MR_TITLE\" --overwrite"
      echo "kubectl annotate deployment/app deployment-tag=\"$PROD_DEPLOYMENT_TAG\" --overwrite"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment_record.json
    expire_in: 90 days
  only:
    - main
  when: manual

create_git_tag:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git
    - git config user.email "ci@gitlab.com"
    - git config user.name "GitLab CI"
  script:
    - |
      VERSION_TAG="v$(date +'%Y.%m.%d')-$SANITIZED_MR_TITLE"
      echo "Creating git tag: $VERSION_TAG"
      
      TAG_MESSAGE="Deployment: $MR_TITLE

Author: $MR_AUTHOR
MR: !$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID
Labels: $MR_LABELS

Description:
$MR_DESCRIPTION

Pipeline: $CI_PIPELINE_URL
Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHA"
      
      git tag -a "$VERSION_TAG" -m "$TAG_MESSAGE"
      echo "Tag created (would be pushed with proper credentials)"
      echo "git push origin $VERSION_TAG"
  only:
    - main
  when: manual

notify_slack:
  stage: notify
  image: curlimages/curl:latest
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build
    - deploy_staging
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        SLACK_MESSAGE=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "text": "Deployment Notification",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "header",
            "text": {
              "type": "plain_text",
              "text": "🚀 Deployment: $MR_TITLE"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Author:*\n$MR_AUTHOR"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Environment:*\nStaging"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*MR:*\n<$MR_URL|!$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID>"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Build Tag:*\n$BUILD_TAG"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "text": {
              "type": "mrkdwn",
              "text": "*Description:*\n$MR_DESCRIPTION"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Deployment Tag:*\n$DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Pipeline:*\n<$CI_PIPELINE_URL|View Pipeline>"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
      )
        
        curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
          --data "$SLACK_MESSAGE" \
          "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL"
        
        echo "Slack notification sent"
      else
        echo "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL not configured, skipping notification"
      fi
  when: on_success

notify_email:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - generate_release_notes
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl
    - |
      EMAIL_SUBJECT="Deployment: $MR_TITLE"
      EMAIL_BODY="Feature Deployed: $MR_TITLE

Author: $MR_AUTHOR
Labels: $MR_LABELS
MR URL: $MR_URL

Description:
$MR_DESCRIPTION

Build Tag: $BUILD_TAG
Pipeline: $CI_PIPELINE_URL
Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHA

Release notes have been generated and attached."
      
      echo "$EMAIL_BODY"
      echo "Email notification prepared (configure SMTP to send)"
  when: on_success

create_gitlab_release:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - generate_release_notes
    - build
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
    - |
      RELEASE_TAG="release-$(date +'%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')-$SANITIZED_MR_TITLE"
      RELEASE_NAME="$MR_TITLE - $(date +'%Y-%m-%d')"
      
      RELEASE_DESCRIPTION=$(cat $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE)
      
      RELEASE_JSON=$(jq -n \
        --arg tag "$RELEASE_TAG" \
        --arg name "$RELEASE_NAME" \
        --arg desc "$RELEASE_DESCRIPTION" \
        --arg ref "$CI_COMMIT_SHA" \
        '{
          tag_name: $tag,
          name: $name,
          description: $desc,
          ref: $ref
        }')
      
      echo "Creating GitLab release:"
      echo "$RELEASE_JSON" | jq '.'
      
      if [ -n "$GITLAB_API_TOKEN" ]; then
        curl --request POST \
          --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $GITLAB_API_TOKEN" \
          --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
          --data "$RELEASE_JSON" \
          "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/releases"
      else
        echo "GITLAB_API_TOKEN not set, skipping release creation"
      fi
  only:
    - main
  when: manual

update_deployment_tracker:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
    - |
      TRACKER_ENTRY=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "timestamp": "$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')",
        "mr_title": "$MR_TITLE",
        "mr_iid": "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID",
        "mr_author": "$MR_AUTHOR",
        "mr_labels": "$MR_LABELS",
        "build_tag": "$BUILD_TAG",
        "commit_sha": "$CI_COMMIT_SHA",
        "branch": "$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH",
        "pipeline_url": "$CI_PIPELINE_URL",
        "mr_url": "$MR_URL"
      }
      EOF
      )
      
      echo "Deployment tracker entry:"
      echo "$TRACKER_ENTRY" | jq '.'
      
      echo "$TRACKER_ENTRY" >> deployment_history.jsonl
      
      echo "Deployment tracked successfully"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment_history.jsonl
    expire_in: 365 days
  when: on_success
